issue_title: fix: support multiple attributes in the injection script
issue_body_preview: PR #275 added support for multiple attributes in applyTheme, but missed handling it in the injection script. This caused page flashes when attribute prop is an array in ThemeProvider. This PR fixes that.
test_description_zh: 在 ThemeProvider 中将 attribute 属性设置为数组（例如 ['class', 'data-theme']），切换主题后刷新页面，观察页面加载瞬间是否出现闪烁（flash of unstyled/wrong-themed content）。
expected_result_zh: 页面刷新时应立即应用正确的主题，不出现任何主题闪烁现象（FOUC），多个属性（如 class 和 data-theme）都应在页面初始渲染时正确设置为当前主题对应的值。
